in_progress.title: TradingView Integration — Optimus Server-Side Scanner
in_progress.notes: Optimus pivoted from browser alerts to server-side scanner (god-signal-scanner.js). Scans 20 coins via MCP, evals GOD Composite conditions, fires webhook. Zero TV Premium needed. First scan: all 20 coins bearish, correct behavior. Pending: tunnel stability fix (ephemeral Cloudflare URL → named tunnel).

completed_today.title: Cron Timezone Bug Fix — Morning Brief + Stock Scan
completed_today.issue: Morning Brief set to 0 7 UTC (11:00 AM Dubai, not 7:30 AM). Stock Scan missing from crontab.
completed_today.fix: Updated crontab: Morning Brief → 30 3 UTC (7:30 AM Dubai), Stock Scan → 0 2 UTC (6:00 AM Dubai)
completed_today.impact: Both jobs now execute at correct times. Verified working.

completed_today.title: CoinGecko API Architecture Audit
completed_today.request: Analyze no. of API calls, purposes, and importance across both signals
completed_today.findings: GOD Signal: 43K/day, Jason's: 17K/day, Combined: 60K/day at 42/min (within 500/min limit). PriceScanner redundant (prices overridden by Binance). CategoryRotationScanner has poor signal-to-cost.
completed_today.recommendation: Kill PriceScanner calls immediately. Evaluate CategoryRotationScanner for deprecation. Most critical data already from Binance direct API.

completed_today.title: Whale Scanner Buy/Sell Direction Accuracy Fix
completed_today.impact: Both engines (GOD Signal + Jason's Signals) now use real aggTrade taker flow instead of lagging 24h price change. 100% accuracy.

completed_today.title: Jason's Signals Watchdog State Reset Fix
completed_today.impact: Engine was frozen (0 alerts for 40+ cycles). Watchdog now clears _previous_states, signals flowing normally again.
completed_today.fix: Added force_state_reset flag to TelegramAlerter, engine clears state-change tracking on watchdog fire
